tasks.title: ADR: persistence tech (SwiftData vs UserDefaults vs Codable-to-disk)
tasks.note: ADR-0002. Codable-to-disk behind PersistenceStore + @AppStorage for settings; SwiftData rejected.

tasks.title: ADR: view-test tooling (ViewInspector vs snapshot testing)
tasks.note: ADR-0003. Core/VM unit tests primary; targeted swift-snapshot-testing for primitives; PR screenshots. ViewInspector rejected. Resolves m5.
